# pexip_infinity_sip_credential (Resource)

Manages a SIP credential with the Infinity service. SIP credentials are used for authenticating SIP endpoints and devices connecting to Pexip Infinity.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "pexip_infinity_sip_credential" "example" {
  realm    = "sip.example.com"
  username = "sip-user"
  password = var.sip_password
}
```


<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `realm` (String) The SIP realm for authentication. Maximum length: 250 characters.
- `username` (String) The SIP username for authentication. Maximum length: 250 characters.

### Optional

- `password` (String, Sensitive) The SIP password for authentication. This field is sensitive.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource URI for the SIP credential in Infinity
- `resource_id` (Number) The resource integer identifier for the SIP credential in Infinity
